sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96085" key="spoudaiologi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπουδαιο-λογία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n96085.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">serious talk</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conversation, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0032.tlg004.perseus-grc1:2:318" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.318</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
